content: 顺便想问一下，为什么同一个密契组件不能存在两个方案里呀？不同情况可能会考虑不用的密契部件，切换起来有点麻烦

守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于11月18日21:25(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年12月2日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、综合优化
【相位对弈】
● 「相位对弈」中「轮选」模式在调整阵容阶段不再展示对方调整阵容的操作。
● 「相位对弈」中的界面细节有所优化，包括对弈分数与图标增加间隔、左下角的奖励标题和进度信息的适配效果。
● 「相位对弈」中与模拟对手战斗后的结算界面增加了「再来一局」按钮表现和提示信息。
● 「相位对弈」结算界面的经验图标进行了美化。
 
【一般】
● 「深海」界域战斗内的职业描述不再详细描述触腕姿态的具体效果，并增加了触腕满溢说明。
● 「阵容」和「战斗记录」的分享码现在更加简洁统一。
● 「命轮」中叠位的「快速放入」功能不再自动放入「循环母版」。
● 「典藏馆」中「创世痴愚之主」的封面有所调整。 
● 「活动」、「幕间演习」、「幻梦深潜」任务描述末尾的任务进度文本字色，改为浅灰色、减弱阅读压力。
● 活动「晨星的指引」中增加了拉蒙娜信件的入口，守密人可在此回顾。
 
二、问题修复
【战斗】
● 修复了「自动战斗」中在某些情况下自动使用应急灵知体的问题，现在改为不会自动使用。
● 修复了唤醒体「珈伦」的「灵塑适性」对「灵知觉醒」的施加中毒效果提升数值不正确的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「莱克」在开启灵知觉醒「绝佳运气」时，「混沌的遗赠」造物无法被正常升级的问题。
● 修复了命轮「暴食」在放弃 2 次刻印后，下次完成战斗仍然会弹出放弃刻印选项的问题。
 
【相位对弈】
● 修复了「相位对弈」中「石化」和「昏迷」效果会错误导致目标卡牌上出现多余描述的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」的「收藏」中命轮详情故事展示内容缺失的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中「轮选」模式在选牌和调整阵容阶段，在9:00每日刷新时会错误地返回到游戏主界面的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」评论中一些玩家昵称显示不全的问题。
● 修复了「对弈纪录」中「万象洞悉」任务可以错误地通过「密码对战」或「友谊赛」完成的问题。 
 
【一般】
● 修复了唤醒活动「与群星相会」中，唤醒次数提示没有优先于源液提示的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「皮克曼」表情效果异常的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒体」界面中点击「取消收藏」后出现部分唤醒体顺序不正确的问题。
● 修复了「典藏馆」收集进度任务奖励可以错误地在「生涯成就」中被一键领取，且达成后会被错误地计入生涯成就达成数量的错误。
● 修复了「选择助战」中选择唤醒体功能不正确的问题。
● 修复了「点赞记录」界面中底部不正确的提示文字。 
● 修复了「宿舍」切换自定义背景弹窗中，部分语言设置下的「默认音画」文字偏长、会出现按钮重叠的问题。
● 修复了「登录」界面中在游戏内资源未下载完成的情况下，音乐有时没有正确播放的问题。
● 修复了「幻梦深潜」排行榜列表滑动困难的问题。
 
【本地化】
● 修复了英语语言设置下，部分唤醒体如「杜勒赛因」的技能描述数值在战斗中未能显示的问题。
● 修复了英语语言设置下，部分唤醒体如「克珀珊特」和部分怪物的技能文本显示错位的问题。
● 修复了英语语言设置下，未获得唤醒体「珈伦」时，珈伦技能「客官请慢用！」的生命回复数值显示错误问题。
● 修复了英语语言设置下的一批剧情文本格式显示问题。
● 修复了其他语言设置下，融灾禁区的排行榜上有未翻译的中文字样的问题。
● 修复了韩语语言设置下，唤醒体「阿格里帕」的技能描述包含错误代码的问题。

**V2.4.0.2 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on November 18 at 21:25(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on December 2, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
1. Comprehensive Optimization
[Traphase]
● In "Traphase," the "Draft Pick" mode will no longer display the opponent's roster adjustment actions during the roster adjustment phase.
● The interface details in "Traphase" have been optimized, including increased spacing for battle scores and icons, and adaptive effects for the reward titles and progress information in the lower left corner.
● The settlement interface after battling simulated rivals in "Traphase" has added the performance and prompt information for the "Play Again" button.
● The EXP icon on the settlement interface of "Traphase" has been beautified.

[Normal]
● The profession description in the "Aequor" realm battle no longer details the specific effects of Tentacle Stance and adds an explanation for Tentacle Overflow.
● The sharing codes for "Lineup" and "Battle Records" are now more concise and unified.
● The "Quick Add" feature for Ascension in the "Wheel of Destiny" no longer automatically adds the "Timeloop Copy".
● The cover of "The Foolish God of Creation" in the "Archive" has been adjusted
● The task progress text color at the end of the descriptions for "Event," "Interlude," and "Phantasmal Dive" has been changed to light gray to reduce reading stress.
● The event "Dawnbringer's Guidance" has added an entry for Ramona's letters, allowing the Keeper to review them here.

II. Problem Fix
[Battle]
● Fixed the issue in "Auto Battle" where Emergency Gnosis was automatically used in certain situations; it will no longer be used automatically.
● Fixed the issue where the "Soulforge Aptitude" of the Awakener "Karen" incorrectly applied the increased Poison effect value for "Rouse".
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Ryker" could not normally upgrade the Relic "Chaotic Legacy" when activating the Gnosis Rouse "Exceptional Luck".
● Fixed an issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Gluttony" would still prompt the option to abandon Orison after giving up 2 times, even after completing the next battle.

[Traphase]
● Fixed the issue in "Traphase" where the "Petrify" and "Fainted" effects could incorrectly cause extra descriptions to appear on target cards.
● Fixed the issue of missing content in the story display of the Wheel of Destiny in the "Collection" of Traphase.
● Fixed the issue in "Traphase" where the "Draft Pick" mode would incorrectly return to the main game interface at 9:00 during the card selection and lineup adjustment phases on daily refresh.
● Fixed the issue where some player nicknames were not fully displayed in the "Traphase" comments.
● Fixed the issue where the "Omniscient Insight" task in "Match Records" could be incorrectly completed through "Password Battles" or "Friendly Matches"

[Normal]
● Fixed the issue in the Awakening Event "Astral Rendezvous" where the awakening count hint did not take priority over the Silver Prime hint.
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Pickman" had abnormal emote effects.
● Fixed the issue where the order of some Awakeners was incorrect after clicking "Unfavorite" on the "Awakener" interface.

● Fixed an issue where the collection progress task rewards in the "Premium Hall" could be incorrectly claimed in "Career Achievements" with one click, and the achievements would be incorrectly counted towards the total number of career achievements completed.
● Fixed the issue with the "Select Support" feature not correctly selecting the Awakener.
● Fixed the incorrect hint text at the bottom of the "Like Record" interface
● Fixed the issue where the text "Default Music and Image" in the custom background switch popup for "Dormitory" was too long and caused button overlap under certain language settings.
● Fixed the issue where the music sometimes did not play correctly on the "Login" screen when the in-game resources had not been fully downloaded.
● Fixed issues with scrolling difficulties in the "Phantasmal Dive" leaderboard list.
 
[English Language]
● Skill Display and Values:
● Fixed issues where the skill description values for Awakeners (e.g., "Doresain") were not displayed correctly during battle.
● Corrected misaligned skill text for various Awakeners (e.g., "Corposant") and Monsters.
● Resolved the incorrect display of the HP recovery value for Karen's skill ("Here's Your Meal!").
● Fixed the incorrect display of the skill description for the Awakener Horla in "Traphase."
● General Text and Formatting:
● Fixed a batch of formatting display issues across all story text and in the "Archive."
 
[Korean Language] 
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Agrippa" skill description contained error codes.
 
●[Untranslated Content]
● Fixed the issue where untranslated Chinese characters appeared on the D-Effect Zone leaderboard in non-Chinese language settings.
之前是一堆bug叠一起修然后补偿50
